args.query: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE date >= '2016-01-01' AND date <= '2016-06-30' GROUP BY business_ref HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC LIMIT 1;

args.code:
description = "Located at 501 Fairmount Ave in Philadelphia, PA, this inviting establishment offers a delightful menu featuring Restaurants, Breakfast & Brunch, American (New), Cafes, perfect for a cozy meal any time of the day."
start_marker = "featuring "
end_marker = ", perfect"
categories = ""
if start_marker in description and end_marker in description:
    categories = description.split(start_marker)[1].split(end_marker)[0]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(f'{{"categories": "{categories}"}}')
